intentSynonyms: show me my comments in jira
see all my comments in jira
list comments on an issue in jira
description: List comments on a Jira issue with pagination support.

max_results.description: Maximum number of comments to return (default 20)

start_at.description: Index of the first comment to return for pagination

order_by.description: Sort order: "created" (oldest first) or "-created" (newest first, default)
